source.scope: Official-source-backed Guyana calendar-year 2026 individual income tax on caller-confirmed annual chargeable income.

GY.notes: 25% on the first GYD 3,360,000 of annual chargeable income and 35% on the excess. Personal deductions, NIS, child, insurance, second-job and overtime deductions remain caller-derived and outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 ordinary individual income tax on caller-confirmed annual chargeable income.
